sentences.arabic: تُعَدُّ النِّيَّةُ الصَّادِقَةُ أَسَاسَ قَبُولِ الْأَعْمَالِ فِي الْإِسْلَامِ، فَلَا يَنْفَعُ عَمَلٌ ظَاهِرٌ إِذَا كَانَ الْقَلْبُ خَالِيًا مِنَ الْإِخْلَاصِ لِلَّهِ تَعَالَى.
sentences.translation: Iskren nijet se smatra osnovom prihvatanja djela u islamu, jer vanjsko djelo ne koristi ako je srce prazno od iskrenosti prema Uzvišenom Allahu.
sentences.translationEn: Sincere intention is considered the foundation for the acceptance of deeds in Islam, as outward actions are of no avail if the heart is devoid of sincerity towards Allah the Almighty.

sentences.arabic: وَقَدْ بَيَّنَ النَّبِيُّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ هَذَا الْأَصْلَ الْعَظِيمَ بِقَوْلِهِ: «إِنَّمَا الْأَعْمَالُ بِالنِّيَّاتِ، وَإِنَّمَا لِكُلِّ امْرِئٍ مَا نَوَى» [رَوَاهُ الْبُخَارِيُّ فِي كِتَابِ بَدْءِ الْوَحْيِ].
sentences.translation: Vjerovjesnik, sallallahu alejhi ve sellem, pojasnio je ovaj veličanstveni temelj rekavši: 'Djela se vrednuju samo prema namjerama i svakom čovjeku pripada ono što je namjerio' [Bilježi Buhari u Knjizi o početku objave].
sentences.translationEn: The Prophet (peace be upon him) clarified this great principle by saying: 'Actions are but by intentions, and every person shall have only that which he intended' [Narrated by al-Bukhari in the Book of the Beginning of Revelation].

sentences.arabic: يُوضِحُ الشَّيْخُ ابْنُ عُثَيْمِينَ رَحِمَهُ اللَّهُ أَنَّ هَذَا الْحَدِيثَ مِيزَانٌ لِلْأَعْمَالِ الْبَاطِنَةِ، وَأَنَّ عَلَى الْمُؤْمِنِ تَصْحِيحَ قَصْدِهِ قَبْلَ الشُّرُوعِ فِي الْعِبَادَةِ.
sentences.translation: Šejh Ibn Usejmin, Allah mu se smilovao, objašnjava da je ovaj hadis mjerilo za unutrašnja djela i da vjernik mora ispraviti svoju namjeru prije nego što započne s ibadetom.
sentences.translationEn: Sheikh Ibn Uthaymeen (may Allah have mercy on him) explains that this hadith is a criterion for inward actions, and that a believer must correct his intention before embarking on worship.

sentences.arabic: فَإِذَا ابْتَغَى الْمُسْلِمُ بِطَاعَتِهِ وَجْهَ اللَّهِ، كُتِبَ لَهُ الْأَجْرُ الْكَامِلُ، أَمَّا إِذَا طَلَبَ الشُّهْرَةَ، فَقَدْ حَبِطَ عَمَلُهُ.
sentences.translation: Ako musliman svojom pokornošću želi Allahovo lice, biće mu upisana potpuna nagrada, dok ako traži slavu, njegovo djelo propada.
sentences.translationEn: If a Muslim seeks the countenance of Allah through his obedience, a full reward is recorded for him, but if he seeks fame, his deed is void.

sentences.arabic: لِذَلِكَ، يَجِبُ عَلَيْنَا مُرَاقَبَةُ قُلُوبِنَا دَائِمًا لِضَمَانِ صِدْقِ التَّوَجُّهِ إِلَى الْخَالِقِ.
sentences.translation: Zbog toga moramo stalno nadzirati svoja srca kako bismo osigurali iskrenost usmjerenja prema Stvoritelju.
sentences.translationEn: Therefore, we must constantly monitor our hearts to ensure the sincerity of our direction towards the Creator.
